use_cases: Displaying a visually engaging 404 error page when routes are not found
Providing cosmic-themed error state with globe animation for brand differentiation
Offering return-to-home navigation through included button components
ai_summary: A cosmic-themed 404 error page component featuring a globe animation with gradient visuals and space illustration aesthetic. Includes a reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes using Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for composition. Ideal for SaaS and media applications wanting a distinctive error page experience.
